result.stdout:
Description:
  Downloads database DACPAC files referenced in an SDK-style SQL Server Database project.
  Will use any NuGet package sources and credentials configured the project's NuGet.Config.

Usage:
  SqlSdkProject.ReferencedDbDownloader [options]

Options:
  --project <project> (REQUIRED)                  The .sqlproj file containing the NuGet database references to download
  --outputDirectory <outputDirectory> (REQUIRED)  The output directory for the downloaded DACPAC files
  --include <include>                             An optional list of additional NuGet packages to download and extract DACPAC files from. The
                                                  format of each package is ID <package>:<version>, for example: --include Microsoft.SqlServer.Dacpacs.Master:160.2.3.
                                                  You can specify multiple packages by separating them with a space, or by repeating the option.
  --version                                       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                  Show help and usage information
